mapper.sql: co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON , co.LEARNING_MODEL_ID , co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_PRB_CON , co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_PRB_CON , co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_PRB_CON , ci.*
mapper.select:
select
from CARD_OUTPUT co inner join LEARNING_MODEL lm on co.LEARNING_MODEL_ID = lm.ID inner join CARD_INPUT ci ON co.TSTM_YMD = ci.TSTM_YMD AND co.TSTM_NO = ci.TSTM_NO AND co.BRCD = ci.BRCD where co.BRCD is not null AND co.TSTM_YMD = #{tstmYmd} AND co.TSTM_NO = #{tstmNo} AND co.BRCD = #{brcd}
